name: terminal-killer
description: Intelligent shell command detector and executor for OpenClaw. Automatically identifies terminal commands (system builtins, $PATH executables, history matches, command patterns) and executes directly without LLM overhead. Cross-platform support (macOS/Linux/Windows).
author: Cosper
securityNote: ⚠️ VirusTotal may flag this skill due to execSync usage - this is intentional core functionality for shell command execution, not malicious behavior. This skill executes user commands locally with no external API calls or data exfiltration. Author: Cosper (cosperypf@163.com)
